reviews.review_description:
It just says looking for players on both devices and nothing happens
￼

All it says is waiting for players no many how many times or ways I try 
Very frustrating considering I paid for it and now can't get a refund

Couldn't get it to work with 10yo son. His avatar was always in the wrong spot but I think mine was ok. Tried a few times with various permutations. Height difference an issue? Any tips and tricks to make the calibration work? I'll see what I can find. Both meta quest 3.

Love the concept. Not refunding. Consider it a crowd fund. Happy to help if any data could be useful. Dev myself. Will try again. Contact if you want but can't guarantee a timely reply. Looks like it's awesome. Thanks!
Great game also I'm not a not but yeah this game is very good
